backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (Price, InventoryItem, Transaction, ShopSettings, reports), persistent state (transactions, inventory, customers, settings), and shared functions for shop settings upload/update, inventory CRUD, transaction management, and reporting.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four cashier page UI features (unified product panel, pinned items dialog, unified search bar, search popup dropdown) to their implementing file `CashierPage.tsx` with associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes of every page, component, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and UI element color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Kasir Bengkel', mounting the app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (Cashier, Inventory, Transactions, Reports, Settings), wraps the app in a dark ThemeProvider, and renders a persistent Sidebar layout with a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component displaying shop logo, transaction info, itemized list with quantities and prices in Rupiah, subtotal, optional discount, total, and a thank-you message — all in Indonesian.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Dark sidebar navigation component rendering five links (Kasir, Inventori, Transaksi, Laporan, Pengaturan) with active-state highlighting using TanStack Router's `useLocation`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via TanStack Query, using the current Internet Identity for authenticated calls and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including shop settings, inventory items, and transactions via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for theming, and includes print styles for receipt output.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, Indonesian Rupiah formatting, date/time formatting, and date-to-nanoseconds conversion.
frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts: Self-contained XLSX file writer and reader implemented without external dependencies, using browser CompressionStream/DecompressionStream APIs to build ZIP-based XLSX files.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: Cashier POS page component that manages a shopping cart, item search, pinned quick-access items, checkout dialog, and receipt printing for inventory transactions.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Empty or stub catalog page component with no content provided.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page with a searchable table of items supporting add, edit, delete, quantity update, and Excel import/export operations via dialogs and form validation.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with tabbed views for daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss reports, using date inputs to query and display business analytics data.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Shop settings page allowing the user to update shop name, address, phone, thank-you message, and upload a logo with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page with search and date-range filtering, showing a table of past transactions with options to view details, print receipts, and delete entries.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (using OKLCH), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a workshop POS app ('Kasir Bengkel'), tracking implemented features (unified product grid capped at 10 pinned items, unified search with popup) and pending architectural requests.
